description_long: This figure represents an adult pedestrian with a muscular build, dressed in a fitted, short-sleeved top and cropped pants. The head is fully covered by a tight hood or mask that extends into a long, narrow appendage down the front, obscuring facial features. The arms are adorned with wide, metallic-looking bracers, and the hands are large and expressive. The lower legs are wrapped with bands, and the feet are clad in open-toed sandals with thick straps. The overall appearance is stylized and slightly intimidating, with a blend of urban and fantasy elements.
description: A masked adult pedestrian with a muscular build, wearing a fitted top, cropped pants, arm bracers, and open-toed sandals. The head is fully covered by a hood with a long, narrow extension.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full mask, chest details, arm bracers, and the long hood extension covering the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood extension, arm bracer, and the layered look of the pants and sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hood, shoulder muscles, and the strapping on the sandals and lower legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hood extension, arm bracer, and the stance of the hands and feet.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted short-sleeved top, cropped pants, wide arm bracers, tight hood with long extension
